entities.ornament: a shiny gold star ornament on the tree

scenes.title: Christmas Morning
scenes.background_prompt: A living room decorated for Christmas with a tall tree in the corner, wrapped presents underneath, stockings hung on a fireplace mantel, and morning light through a window. No people, no ornaments on the tree.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cozy living room on Christmas morning. Soft golden light streams through a frost-edged window. A tall Christmas tree stands in the corner, covered in green garlands and small white lights. At the very top, a large gold star ornament shines brilliantly, its polished metallic surface catching and reflecting the morning light in dazzling rays — it looks brand new and luminous compared to the softer, matte ornaments below it. A child of about six in red flannel pajamas with white snowflake patterns sits cross-legged on the carpet in front of the tree, looking up at the star with wonder, mouth slightly open. Wrapped presents in green, red, and gold paper are piled under the tree. Stockings hang from the fireplace mantel, each stuffed and bulging.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place child on the carpet in front of the Christmas tree, sitting cross-legged and looking up at the star with wonder. Place ornament (gold star) at the very top of the tree, polished and catching morning light in dazzling rays.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a decorative rug with a blue and white border sits on a light brown wooden floor. On this rug, several wrapped gifts are clustered around the base of a large green Christmas tree. The gifts include a small blue box with white stars, a green box with a red ribbon, a tall blue box with white stars and a red bow, a green box with a yellow bow, a small white box with a blue ribbon, a purple box with a white ribbon, a red and yellow striped box with a red bow, a round pink box with a green ribbon, and an orange and green striped box with a green ribbon. The Christmas tree, positioned on the left side of the room, is decorated with strings of small glowing yellow lights, which serve as each ornament, and is topped with a large, glowing five-pointed yellow star. In the center foreground, a young child with short brown hair sits cross-legged on the wooden floor, facing left and looking up at the tree with a smile. The child is wearing yellow pajamas patterned with blue stars and crescent moons, along with blue socks. To the right of the child, a stone fireplace built of rounded grey and brown stones occupies the right side of the room. Inside the fireplace, a bright orange and yellow fire burns on a log. Hanging from the dark wood mantle are three stockings: a brown one with a white reindeer, a light blue one with a white snowflake, and a green and white striped one. Behind the fireplace and to its left, a grey armchair is tucked into the corner, with a light blue and pink blanket draped over its back. In the background, centered behind the child, is a large three-paned window with a white frame. Through the window, a bright winter scene is visible, featuring snow-covered pine trees under a pale blue sky with soft white clouds. Bright rays of sunlight stream through the window into the room. The walls of the room are a pale cream color with simple white molding at the top and bottom.

CH: a young boy with short brown hair
S: a cozy living room on Christmas morning
snowy pine trees visible through the window
a warm fire burning in the stone fireplace
bright sunlight streaming through the large window
IE: the child finds presents under the tree
the sun rises on a snowy Christmas day

the child is excited to see the gifts
P: the boy wants to open his Christmas presents
the child plans to admire the glowing star
A: sitting cross-legged on the wooden floor
looking up at the tall Christmas tree
smiling at the beautiful holiday decorations
CO: the room is filled with morning light
many colorful gifts wait to be opened

ENP: a large green tree with glowing lights
a bright yellow star on the top
yellow pajamas with blue stars and moons
colorful wrapped gifts with pretty bows
a stone fireplace with three hanging stockings
SC: because it is finally Christmas morning
while the sun shines through the window
when he looks at the glowing star
